user_stories.goal: Enter a destination, trip length, budget level, and interests to generate a personalised day-by-day itinerary
user_stories.benefit: Receive a clear, feasible plan tailored to my time, budget and interests so I can make the most of the trip
acceptance_criteria: Given valid destination, trip length (days), budget level and at least one interest, when I submit the form, then the system returns a day-by-day itinerary covering each day of the trip
Each day includes at least one recommended activity, approximate timing or duration, estimated cost and travel time between activities
If any required input is missing or invalid, the system returns a clear validation error and does not generate an itinerary

user_stories.goal: View the generated itinerary on the website with clear daily breakdown and activity details
user_stories.benefit: Easily read and follow the plan on my phone or laptop during the trip
acceptance_criteria: The website displays the itinerary as a day-by-day list with activity names, descriptions, start times, durations and estimated costs
Each activity includes an address and a link to open the location on a map service
The itinerary page is responsive (usable on mobile and desktop) and supports printing

user_stories.goal: Retrieve and submit itinerary generation requests programmatically via a Flask API
user_stories.benefit: Integrate itinerary generation with other services or automate workflows
acceptance_criteria: A POST /api/itineraries endpoint accepts JSON with destination, trip_length_days, budget_level and interests and returns structured JSON representing the day-by-day itinerary
Successful responses use HTTP 200 and include a machine-readable itinerary; validation errors use 4xx with descriptive messages
The API respects the same generation rules as the website (activity counts, timings, costs) and includes an identifier for saved itineraries

user_stories.goal: Save, edit and re-generate my itinerary after initial creation
user_stories.benefit: Customize the plan to my preferences and keep changes for later access
acceptance_criteria: I can save a generated itinerary to my account and retrieve it later by ID
I can edit activity details (time, remove/add activities) and either keep edits or request re-generation which preserves user edits where possible
Saved changes persist across sessions and are returned by both the web UI and API

user_stories.goal: Export or share the itinerary (PDF/CSV/link) for offline use or sharing with companions
user_stories.benefit: Have a portable copy of the plan I can view without the app and easily share with others
acceptance_criteria: The website/API offers export options: PDF and CSV of the full day-by-day itinerary
Exports include activity names, times, addresses and estimated costs and provide a shareable URL option
Exported PDFs are formatted for printing and CSVs are machine-readable with one row per activity including day and time
